case_title: BRANDON BASTUNAS VS. ELIZABETH N. DIXON

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED SEP-15-2009, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT DIXON, ELIZABETH N
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-19-2009 - JUDGMENT.
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-19-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-19-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: ALAN SILVERMAN. APPEARANCE BY BOTH PARTIES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BASTUNAS, BRANDON RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DIXON, ELIZABETH N $3,600.00 PRINCIPAL, $150.00 INTEREST, $185.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,935.00, THIS WAS A LOW IMPACT ACCIDENT CAUSING BODY DAMAGE TO VEHICLES. THE COURT FINDS CHIROPRACTIC TREATMENT EXCESSIVE. DEFENDANT ADMITTED LIABILTY. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT DIXON, ELIZABETH N
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM ALAN SILVERMAN FILED BY BASTUNAS, BRANDON DIXON, ELIZABETH N
DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE, FILED. UNABLE TO SERVE.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-26-2009 IS OFF CALENDAR, NO SERVICE.
TRIAL RESET TO OCT-19-2009 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JAN-04-2010 ORDERED DESTROYED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY BASTUNAS, BRANDON ., . AS TO DEFENDANT DIXON, ELIZABETH N ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-26-2009 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
